title: Astarse
description: Astarse is a Japanese-themed adventure modpack for Forge 1.20.1. Explore a vast world inspired by feudal Japan, with new quests, professions, animals, magic, and an immersive RPG experience.
body:
Welcome to Astarse! This modpack offers:

A large custom map inspired by feudal Japan

Many new animals and mobs

Custom professions (samurai, monk, blacksmith, merchant, etc.)

Quests, NPCs, and immersive gameplay

RPG systems, magic mods, and more!
